faqs.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
faqs.title: Key questions before starting
faqs.description: We answer the most common questions before starting your Google Ads and social media strategy.

items.q: What results can we expect and when?
items.a: You can usually see early traction in the first weeks. Sustainable results come from consistent optimization over time.

items.q: Do we need a dedicated landing page?
items.a: In most cases, yes. A focused landing page improves message clarity and increases inquiry conversion.
We track key actions like forms, calls and WhatsApp, then optimize based on cost per qualified inquiry.

items.q: Can you work with our current website?
items.a: Yes. We review your current setup and define whether to optimize it or launch a dedicated campaign landing.

about5.subtitle: About the Company
about5.title: Digital marketing agency focused on results
about5.text: At Software Strategy we design and execute digital marketing strategies that combine content, Google Ads and social media advertising, and advanced analytics. Our goal is clear: help your business achieve real, measurable growth.
about5.authorsText: We Have 5k+ Global Clients Around the World

items.title: Research & Strategy

items.title: Results
